title: Deputy Program Manager - Enterprise Cyber/RMF PMO
notes: Direct match - Deputy PM orchestrating cost/schedule/risk/staffing across Prime TTOs for enterprise cybersecurity and NIST RMF support near Fort Meade. Master's + DoD/IC PM experience. Mirrors her C-SCRM program leadership.

title: Director of Local Cybersecurity
notes: MD state director role, explicitly a State CISO succession-planning position. Leads SOC/IR teams in complex cloud environment. Strong state-gov fit; no clearance barrier. Confirm close date on JobAps before applying.

title: Cybersecurity Executive (DHS Cybersecurity Service)
notes: DHS Cybersecurity Service executive cadre - leads multifaceted mission/programs/personnel. SES-equivalent pay band. Her federal exec background + TS/SCI directly relevant. Verify close date on USAJOBS.

title: Deputy Chief, Information Security Officer (Repost)
notes: Deputy CISO for MD state - direct title match. Repost = still open. No clearance requirement, local to Ellicott City. Confirm current close date on JobAps.

title: Supervisory IT Specialist (Cyber Policy and Planning), GS-15
notes: CLOSES JULY 8, 2026 - APPLY NOW. GS-15 supervisory cyber policy/planning. Requires 1 yr specialized experience at GS-14 level. Her policy + workforce leadership qualifies.

title: Director of IT Security and Compliance
notes: Director-level security + compliance/GRC for MSDE. State-gov, MD-local, no clearance barrier. Her CRISC/GRC background fits. Confirm close date on JobAps.

title: Information Systems Security Manager (ISSM), Senior Advisor
notes: Senior ISSM advisor at Fort Meade. RMF A&A leadership. Poly premium pushes comp high. Her ISSM/RMF + endpoint security tenure is a direct fit.

title: Senior Cybersecurity Supply Chain Risk Management (C-SCRM) Analyst
notes: Exact specialty match - supports agency OCIO C-SCRM program, procurement/supplier risk assessment for IT/OT. Active TS required, willing to obtain SCI + CI poly. Below her director level but core C-SCRM domain.

title: Technical Program Manager - TS/SCI w/Polygraph
notes: Technical PM, 10+ yrs PM/systems engineering, TS/SCI+Poly. IC mission programs. Her cross-agency program leadership + MBA cover the PM credential gap.

title: Information Systems Security Manager (ISSM) 2 - TS/SCI w/Poly
notes: ISSM Level 2 at Fort Meade, RMF authorization workflows. DoD 8570 (CISSP/CISM) required - she holds both. Local, high-clearance comp.

title: Senior Information System Security Officer (ISSO)
notes: Senior ISSO, RMF A&A on a Columbia-area prime. No remote. 12+ yrs security authorization. Direct RMF/ISSM lineage fit; near home.

title: Supervisory IT Cybersecurity Specialist (INFOSEC)
notes: DoD supervisory INFOSEC lead. Federal GS-14/15 band. Her DoD Division Chief + NSA technical director experience is a direct match. Confirm close date on USAJOBS.

title: Senior Technical Program Manager - TS/SCI
notes: Senior technical PM on cleared IC/DoD program. Her portfolio + program leadership across contractors fits. Verify exact location/employer on posting.

title: Supervisory IT Cybersecurity Specialist
notes: Federal supervisory cyber specialist, GS-14/15. Strong fit for her supervisory federal background. Confirm close date + duty station on USAJOBS.

title: Program Manager - Network Solutions Division
notes: PM for Network Solutions Division, 10+ yrs IT PM, 5+ yrs multi-project. TS/SCI w/Poly. Solid PM fit; Arlington commute or relocate.

title: Information Systems Security Officer (ISSO), Senior
notes: Senior ISSO at Fort Meade, RMF authorization. Slightly below her level but local and high-clearance comp. Good fallback in the ISSM/RMF lane.

title: Supervisory IT Specialist (Cybersecurity)
notes: Federal supervisory cybersecurity role. Verify duty station and close date on USAJOBS; may be MD-based. Fits her supervisory federal profile.

title: Information Systems Security Manager (ISSM), Senior - TS/SCI w/Poly
notes: Senior ISSM, RMF A&A, Poly premium (comp can exceed $200K). Confirm employer on posting. Core ISSM fit near home.

title: Director - Cybersecurity Third Party Risk Management (Remote)
notes: Fully remote TPRM director - leads next-gen third-party cyber risk program. Commercial (pharma), not federal, but director title + remote + her supply-chain/vendor risk depth are a strong non-cleared option.

title: Adjunct Faculty - Cybersecurity for Leaders and Managers
notes: Part-time remote adjunct - she's a 2x UMGC alum with new MBA. Teaches CSIA cyber leadership. Great flexible/advisory income stream alongside a primary role.

title: Adjunct Faculty - Digital Forensics & Cyber Investigation
notes: Part-time remote adjunct matching her MS in Digital Forensics & Cyber Investigations. Flexible workforce-development track; pairs well with a full-time role.

title: State Chief Information Security Officer (SCISO)
notes: Statewide CISO, serves at Governor's pleasure. Requires 10 yrs security + managing workforce >50 (she led 50-person DoD team). Aspirational appointed role; verify if currently open vs. reference posting.

title: Director, Cybersecurity Risk & Governance (Remote)
notes: Aggregated remote GRC director openings (NIST/ISO 27001/SOC 2). Her CISM/CRISC + risk-program leadership fit. Screen for cleared-preferred and MD-friendly employers.

title: Director, IT Third Party Risk Management (Remote)
notes: Aggregated remote TPRM director/lead roles (256+ open). Directly leverages her C-SCRM and vendor-risk experience. Filter for director-level and 10+ yr program roles.

title: Cyber Intelligence Analyst - TS/SCI w/Poly
notes: Cyber intel/threat analysis at Fort Meade. Below her leadership level but keeps her in the cleared IC pipeline; her Red Team/CND background applies.

title: Program Manager - DoD Mission Programs (TS/SCI)
notes: PM for DoD mission programs, 8-10 yrs experience, TS/SCI. Solid PM fit; Arlington commute. Verify exact scope on posting.

title: GRC Lead / Cyber Compliance Program Lead (Remote)
notes: Aggregated remote GRC/compliance lead roles (NIST/FedRAMP/SOC 2). 152+ open. Good mid-tier fit for her risk/compliance credentials; screen for director-track.

title: Vendor / Third-Party Risk Management Lead (DC / Remote)
notes: Aggregated TPRM lead roles, DC + remote. Her supply-chain risk depth applies. Screen for senior/lead level and financial-services or gov-adjacent employers.

title: Chief Information Security Officer (Remote, Enterprise)
notes: Aspirational enterprise CISO band ($220K-$420K), CISSP + 10-15 yrs leadership. Stretch on private-sector enterprise scale, but her exec breadth supports a run at select roles.

title: VP, Security / Security Executive (Remote)
notes: VP-level security exec, commercial. Aspirational leap from federal to private VP; strong comp. Positioning + a warm intro would help. Screen for gov-tech / regulated-industry employers.

title: Director, Cyber Risk Advisory (Big 4 / Consulting)
notes: Big 4 / advisory cyber-risk director track. Aspirational move into consulting; her federal credibility + MBA are assets. Expect business-development expectations.

title: Chief Information Security Officer
notes: Aggregated Baltimore-area CISO postings. Local, but private-enterprise CISO is a step outside her federal lane. Screen for healthcare/finance/gov-contractor employers valuing clearance.

title: Portfolio / Cyber Program Director (Cleared)
notes: Portfolio/program director over multiple cyber task orders. Aspirational scale but aligns with her multi-contractor program leadership. Screen ClearanceJobs for director-titled PMO roles.

title: Cybersecurity Workforce Development / Training Lead (Hybrid)
notes: Workforce-development / training leadership - she built NSA's Mission Manager curriculum and DISA 8570 workforce program. Niche fit; may be part-time or hybrid. Screen for MD-based programs.
